---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, workflow, or product improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user or developer problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you want to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives you have considered.

## Impact

Who benefits from this feature, and how important is it?

## Additional Context

Add mockups, references, flows, or implementation notes if helpful.
